title: River Plastic Recovery Through Community Sorting Stations
abstract: This project evaluates low-cost sorting stations near waterways to reduce plastic runoff.
caption: A student-led prototype that turns river plastic hotspots into organized community sorting points.

title: Barangay Flood Early Warning with Low-Cost Sensors
abstract: This project studies flood-level alerting using simple IoT water-level sensors and SMS notifications.
caption: An affordable early-warning concept designed to alert residents before floodwaters become dangerous.
